name: Brian O’Toole
background: Mr. O’Toole has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since September 2021. Previously, Mr. O’Toole served as Chief Executive Officer of Legacy BlackSky from February 2019 to September 2021 and as President of Legacy BlackSky from 2016 to February 2019. Prior to joining Legacy BlackSky, Mr. O’Toole was the Chief Technology Officer of GeoEye, Inc. and also held senior leadership roles at GE Aerospace and Hewlett-Packard.
